utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), and total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Counting strictly: destination (1), travel_dates (0), transportation (0 due to missing flight details), accommodation (1), activities (1), additional_services (0), total_budget (1). That yields 4 covered out of 6.
